TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Konglikay == 1. Makoracay mitooray. Mala hongti ci Mary, mifalicay mitooray maherek to patala to masatadasay a sera, caay ka pawan ningra ko ina ato sawaco no niyah, misa'icel mikari'ang to demak no mifalicay to pitooran, kari'angen ko mifalicay, palowad to Tingsokiw. saka enem miheca to kala hongti mapatay cingra, oya pifalic to pitooran no Inkiris a tayal mapadoedo aca. Ci Elizabeth saka cecay ko midotocay, malatosaay ko pidemak ningra to kanga'ayaw, pa'icel cingra o hongti no Inkiris o tatapangan no Inkiris kiwkay, polong no kitakit a kiwkay masacecay ko 'edaw no pita'ong, oya kapolongan a sapitolon a tilid. Sapalasawad to kalaliyang no pakayraan ato lalood, nika oya nai Reniwa patikoay a mifalicay pa'icel to tadamaan no Fangcalay cudad, I 1559 miheca o miliyangay ko pinangan, miliyang to kapolongan tolon a tilid ato kakeridan no pita'ong (tadamanay riko'). Roma tamdaw mangalay miliyaw misa'opo to kiwkay, patireng to Konglikay ato paceno'kay, roma a tamdaw itira sa i sakowan ko pifalic a makoracay mitooray sa o Independent han to cangra. Katadamaanan: (1) Caay ka sa kiwha, itira sa i laloma no sakowan a mifalic. O safana' nangra talolong ko kafiyol to ni Kalfin , misa'icel to kaira tatapangan raraw, matoleday, paso'elinay o mo'ecelay, ato pa'ayaway sowal. (2) O miliyangay to tadamaan no taheka ato miliyangay to todong, ma'imer a miliyang to sa'edaw no pitadem. (3) Dengan o pingodo to Fangcalay cudad, awaayto ko roma. (4) Ma'imer to pisarocodan ato wayway a demak. 2. Konglikay: Makoracay mitooray a maroharohay faco I 1581 miheca miliyas cangra to kitakit a kiwkay o miliyasay sa ko pangangan, nai ci Ropet Pron (Robert Browne, 1550-1633) ato ci Henry Parow (Henry Barrow, 1550-93) ko pikerid. Mitilid cangra to pakayniay to sapasifana' a faco. 1581 miheca i Norwic (Norwich) patireng to kiwkay, mitelekan ko pikapot, kakoniyah mipili' to patenakay tamdaw, midotoc to nitelekan ko demak, ci salongoc ko salikaka mico'a'ang ano eca malaliyang to demak. Ikor itira i kitakit kiwkay ko tayal ni Ropet Pron (Robert Browne), tangasa kapatayan. Ci Parow to ko midotocay to tayal tangasa 1593 mihecaan a mapatay. Ci J. Ropinsen ( J. Robinson , 1575-1625) adihay ko nitilidan, mangalef ko ni Yohani Owen (John Owen, 1616-83) nitilid to "The Nature of a Gospel Church" ikor malapaterongan sifana' no Konglikay. 3. Sarikec. Kakeridan: Tingsokiw, Lotekay, Senkongkay, Wislikay, Tongcenkiwkay. Dayhiw: Mifalicay pakayraan=Ciwlo pakayraan. Slikaka: Konglikay, Paceno'kay. 4. Sfana': Pron ato Parow (Browne & Barrow) nano Kalfin pakayraan. (四,教義:Browne & Barrow屬於加爾文派.) (1) Mipalasawad to no kitakit harateng, awaay ko todong no sifo mitelek ano eca mikihar to demak no kiwkay. (2) O salikaka no kiwkay pakoniyahay micomod, oya paretatenga sanay mitooray micomod i nitelekan saheto o salikaka no kiwkay. (3) Pa'icel salikaka o citodong to ta'ong, mipili'ay ko kiwkay to foksi ciwlo, mipadamso to pakosiya ato maponengay tamdaw. (4) kasakiwkay i hoyin ato midemakay o misiikeday, nika masasidama o malikakaay. 5. Amilika. I 1620 miheca tayni fa'olohay pala a makoracay mitooray, nano o misiikeday , nika i Amilikaay a makoracay mitooray i Masacusa (Massachusetts) patireng to mirocokay kasanga'ay no syakay, niMosi a rikec, saan milaheci to so'elin no Kawas ko patosokan mikowan to sici, tangasa i 1833 miheca mapalasawad ko Masacusa. Saki ciwiko masafaco nangra, siiked i 1636 miheca ato 1701 miheca mapatireng ko Hofo ato Yale daykako. I 18 sici masereray, ikor o Konglikay ci Yonatan Edward (Jonathan Edwards, 1703-1758) ato Kalfin Wili (alvinistic Methodist) pakayraan ci Cioci Waytefid (George Whitefield, 1714-1770) to ko mikeriday, misatapang to i 1740-42 mihecaan mapalowad. Ikor ci Yonatan Edward (Jonathan Edwards) patireng to Niw cisi kakoyin oya Polinston daykako (Princeton University). Kalalaedan midotoc patireng to Wilian, Amhert, Opelin (Williams, Amherst, Oberlin) pitilidan. 19 sician, salongan ira ko 100 ko kiwkay miliyasay to Konglikay, mipatireng to Malacecayay ko tireng no Kawas a kiwkay. I 1781 miheca patireng to "Amilika kitakit wiyinhuy . tolo miheca kina cecay malisaot. 1833 miheca patireng to Kongli nipatatekoan . 6. Malikowat Kristo kiwkay Malikowat Kristo kiwkay I 1957 miheca masarocok, nai Kiristo Konglikay sokay ato Ratoh ato mifalicay pakayraan kiwkay a matateko. 1997 miheca ira 1,400,000 ko salikaka.
S.PHON: == ko~uŋɾikaj == *. mako~uraʦaj mito~uo~uraj. maɾa ħo~uŋti ʦi marj, mifaɾiʦaj mito~uo~uraj maħərək to~u pataɾa to~u masataɬ~ɮasaj a səra, ʦaaj ka pawan niŋra ko~u ina ato~u sawaʦo~u no~u nijaħ, misaʡiʦəɾ mikariʡaŋ to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u mifaɾiʦaj to~u pito~uo~uran, kariʡaŋən ko~u mifaɾiʦaj, paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u tiŋso~ukiw. saka ənəm miħəʦa to~u kaɾa ħo~uŋti mapataj ʦiŋra, o~uja pifaɾiʦ to~u pito~uo~uran no~u inkiris a tajaɾ mapaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u aʦa. ʦi əɾi*ab~b~vətħ saka ʦəʦaj ko~u miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj, maɾato~usaaj ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak niŋra to~u kaŋaʡajaw, paʡiʦəɾ ʦiŋra o~u ħo~uŋti no~u inkiris o~u tatapaŋan no~u inkiris kiwkaj, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit a kiwkaj masaʦəʦaj ko~u ʡəɬ~ɮaw no~u pitaʡo~uŋ, o~uja kapo~uɾo~uŋan a sapito~uɾo~un a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. sapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u kaɾaɾijaŋ no~u pakajraan ato~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, nika o~uja nai rəniwa patiko~uaj a mifaɾiʦaj paʡiʦəɾ to~u taɬ~ɮamaan no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, i **** miħəʦa o~u miɾijaŋaj ko~u pinaŋan, miɾijaŋ to~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan to~uɾo~un a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ato~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u pitaʡo~uŋ (taɬ~ɮamanaj riko~uʡ). ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw maŋaɾaj miɾijaw misaʡo~upo~u to~u kiwkaj, patirəŋ to~u ko~uŋɾikaj ato~u paʦəno~uʡkaj, ro~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw itira sa i sako~uwan ko~u pifaɾiʦ a mako~uraʦaj mito~uo~uraj sa o~u inɬ~ɮəpənɬ~ɮənt ħan to~u ʦaŋra. kataɬ~ɮamaanan: (*) ʦaaj ka sa kiwħa, itira sa i ɾaɾo~uma no~u sako~uwan a mifaɾiʦ. o~u safanaʡ naŋra taɾo~uɾo~uŋ ko~u kafijo~uɾ to~u ni kaɾfin , misaʡiʦəɾ to~u kaira tatapaŋan raraw, mato~uɾəɬ~ɮaj, paso~uʡəɾinaj o~u mo~uʡəʦəɾaj, ato~u paʡajawaj so~uwaɾ. (*) o~u miɾijaŋaj to~u taɬ~ɮamaan no~u taħəka ato~u miɾijaŋaj to~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, maʡimər a miɾijaŋ to~u saʡəɬ~ɮaw no~u pitaɬ~ɮəm. (*) ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u piŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, awaajto~u ko~u ro~uma. (*) maʡimər to~u pisaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮan ato~u wajwaj a ɬ~ɮəmak. *. ko~uŋɾikaj: mako~uraʦaj mito~uo~uraj a maro~uħaro~uħaj faʦo~u i **** miħəʦa miɾijas ʦaŋra to~u kitakit a kiwkaj o~u miɾijasaj sa ko~u paŋaŋan, nai ʦi ro~upət pro~un (ro~ub~b~vərt b~b~vro~uwnə, ****-****) ato~u ʦi ħənrj paro~uw (ħənrj b~b~varro~uw, ****-**) ko~u pikəriɬ~ɮ. mitiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦaŋra to~u pakajniaj to~u sapasifanaʡ a faʦo~u. **** miħəʦa i no~urwiʦ (no~urwiʦħ) patirəŋ to~u kiwkaj, mitəɾəkan ko~u pikapo~ut, kako~unijaħ mipiɾiʡ to~u patənakaj tamɬ~ɮaw, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u nitəɾəkan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦi saɾo~uŋo~uʦ ko~u saɾikaka miʦo~uʡaʡaŋ ano~u əʦa maɾaɾijaŋ to~u ɬ~ɮəmak. iko~ur itira i kitakit kiwkaj ko~u tajaɾ ni ro~upət pro~un (ro~ub~b~vərt b~b~vro~uwnə), taŋasa kapatajan. ʦi paro~uw to~u ko~u miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj to~u tajaɾ taŋasa **** miħəʦaan a mapataj. ʦi *. ro~upinsən ( *. ro~ub~b~vinso~un , ****-****) aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan, maŋaɾəf ko~u ni jo~uħani o~uwən (*o~uħn o~uwən, ****-**) nitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u "tħə nato~u~urə o~uf a *o~uspəɾ ʦħo~u~urʦħ" iko~ur maɾapatəro~uŋan sifanaʡ no~u ko~uŋɾikaj. *. sarikəʦ. kakəriɬ~ɮan: tiŋso~ukiw, ɾo~utəkaj, sənko~uŋkaj, wisɾikaj, to~uŋʦənkiwkaj. ɬ~ɮajħiw: mifaɾiʦaj pakajraan=ʦiwɾo~u pakajraan. sɾikaka: ko~uŋɾikaj, paʦəno~uʡkaj. *. sfanaʡ: pro~un ato~u paro~uw (b~b~vro~uwnə & b~b~varro~uw) nano~u kaɾfin pakajraan. (*,**:b~b~vro~uwnə & b~b~varro~uw******.) (*) mipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u no~u kitakit ħaratəŋ, awaaj ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u sifo~u mitəɾək ano~u əʦa mikiħar to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u kiwkaj. (*) o~u saɾikaka no~u kiwkaj pako~unijaħaj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ, o~uja parətatəŋa sanaj mito~uo~uraj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i nitəɾəkan saħəto~u o~u saɾikaka no~u kiwkaj. (*) paʡiʦəɾ saɾikaka o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u taʡo~uŋ, mipiɾiʡaj ko~u kiwkaj to~u fo~uksi ʦiwɾo~u, mipaɬ~ɮamso~u to~u pako~usija ato~u mapo~unəŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw. (*) kasakiwkaj i ħo~ujin ato~u miɬ~ɮəmakaj o~u misiikəɬ~ɮaj, nika masasiɬ~ɮama o~u maɾikakaaj. *. amiɾika. i **** miħəʦa tajni faʡo~uɾo~uħaj paɾa a mako~uraʦaj mito~uo~uraj, nano~u o~u misiikəɬ~ɮaj , nika i amiɾikaaj a mako~uraʦaj mito~uo~uraj i masaʦo~u~usa (massaʦħo~u~usətts) patirəŋ to~u miro~uʦo~ukaj kasaŋaʡaj no~u sjakaj, nimo~usi a rikəʦ, saan miɾaħəʦi to~u so~uʡəɾin no~u kawas ko~u pato~uso~ukan miko~uwan to~u siʦi, taŋasa i **** miħəʦa mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u masaʦo~u~usa. saki ʦiwiko~u masafaʦo~u naŋra, siikəɬ~ɮ i **** miħəʦa ato~u **** miħəʦa mapatirəŋ ko~u ħo~ufo~u ato~u jaɾə ɬ~ɮajkako~u. i ** siʦi masərəraj, iko~ur o~u ko~uŋɾikaj ʦi jo~unatan əɬ~ɮwarɬ~ɮ (*o~unatħan əɬ~ɮwarɬ~ɮs, ****-****) ato~u kaɾfin wiɾi (aɾb~vinistiʦ mətħo~uɬ~ɮist) pakajraan ʦi ʦio~uʦi wajtəfiɬ~ɮ (*əo~ur*ə wħitəfiəɾɬ~ɮ, ****-****) to~u ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj, misatapaŋ to~u i ****-** miħəʦaan mapaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ. iko~ur ʦi jo~unatan əɬ~ɮwarɬ~ɮ (*o~unatħan əɬ~ɮwarɬ~ɮs) patirəŋ to~u niw ʦisi kako~ujin o~uja po~uɾinsto~un ɬ~ɮajkako~u (prinʦəto~un o~u~unib~vərsitj). kaɾaɾaəɬ~ɮan miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ patirəŋ to~u wiɾian, amħərt, o~upəɾin (wiɾɾiams, amħərst, o~ub~b~vərɾin) pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. ** siʦian, saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u *** ko~u kiwkaj miɾijasaj to~u ko~uŋɾikaj, mipatirəŋ to~u maɾaʦəʦajaj ko~u tirəŋ no~u kawas a kiwkaj. i **** miħəʦa patirəŋ to~u "amiɾika kitakit wijinħo~u~uj . to~uɾo~u miħəʦa kina ʦəʦaj maɾisao~ut. **** miħəʦa patirəŋ to~u ko~uŋɾi nipatatəko~uan . *. maɾiko~uwat kristo~u kiwkaj maɾiko~uwat kristo~u kiwkaj i **** miħəʦa masaro~uʦo~uk, nai kiristo~u ko~uŋɾikaj so~ukaj ato~u rato~uħ ato~u mifaɾiʦaj pakajraan kiwkaj a matatəko~u. **** miħəʦa ira *,***,*** ko~u saɾikaka.
S.FORM: == Konglikay == 1. Makoracay mitooray. Mala hongti ci Mary, mifalicay mitooray maherek to patala to masatadasay a sera, caay ka pawan ningra ko ina ato sawaco no niyah, misa'icel mikari'ang to demak no mifalicay to pitooran, kari'angen ko mifalicay, palowad to Tingsokiw. saka enem miheca to kala hongti mapatay cingra, oya pifalic to pitooran no Inkiris a tayal mapadoedo aca. Ci Elizabeth saka cecay ko midotocay, malatosaay ko pidemak ningra to kanga'ayaw, pa'icel cingra o hongti no Inkiris o tatapangan no Inkiris kiwkay, polong no kitakit a kiwkay masacecay ko 'edaw no pita'ong, oya kapolongan a sapitolon a tilid. Sapalasawad to kalaliyang no pakayraan ato lalood, nika oya nai Reniwa patikoay a mifalicay pa'icel to tadamaan no Fangcalay cudad, I 1559 miheca o miliyangay ko pinangan, miliyang to kapolongan tolon a tilid ato kakeridan no pita'ong (tadamanay riko'). Roma tamdaw mangalay miliyaw misa'opo to kiwkay, patireng to Konglikay ato paceno'kay, roma a tamdaw itira sa i sakowan ko pifalic a makoracay mitooray sa o Independent han to cangra. Katadamaanan: (1) Caay ka sa kiwha, itira sa i laloma no sakowan a mifalic. O safana' nangra talolong ko kafiyol to ni Kalfin , misa'icel to kaira tatapangan raraw, matoleday, paso'elinay o mo'ecelay, ato pa'ayaway sowal. (2) O miliyangay to tadamaan no taheka ato miliyangay to todong, ma'imer a miliyang to sa'edaw no pitadem. (3) Dengan o pingodo to Fangcalay cudad, awaayto ko roma. (4) Ma'imer to pisarocodan ato wayway a demak. 2. Konglikay: Makoracay mitooray a maroharohay faco I 1581 miheca miliyas cangra to kitakit a kiwkay o miliyasay sa ko pangangan, nai ci Ropet Pron (Robert Browne, 1550-1633) ato ci Henry Parow (Henry Barrow, 1550-93) ko pikerid. Mitilid cangra to pakayniay to sapasifana' a faco. 1581 miheca i Norwic (Norwich) patireng to kiwkay, mitelekan ko pikapot, kakoniyah mipili' to patenakay tamdaw, midotoc to nitelekan ko demak, ci salongoc ko salikaka mico'a'ang ano eca malaliyang to demak. Ikor itira i kitakit kiwkay ko tayal ni Ropet Pron (Robert Browne), tangasa kapatayan. Ci Parow to ko midotocay to tayal tangasa 1593 mihecaan a mapatay. Ci J. Ropinsen ( J. Robinson , 1575-1625) adihay ko nitilidan, mangalef ko ni Yohani Owen (John Owen, 1616-83) nitilid to "The Nature of a Gospel Church" ikor malapaterongan sifana' no Konglikay. 3. Sarikec. Kakeridan: Tingsokiw, Lotekay, Senkongkay, Wislikay, Tongcenkiwkay. Dayhiw: Mifalicay pakayraan=Ciwlo pakayraan. Slikaka: Konglikay, Paceno'kay. 4. Sfana': Pron ato Parow (Browne & Barrow) nano Kalfin pakayraan. (四,教義:Browne & Barrow屬於加爾文派.) (1) Mipalasawad to no kitakit harateng, awaay ko todong no sifo mitelek ano eca mikihar to demak no kiwkay. (2) O salikaka no kiwkay pakoniyahay micomod, oya paretatenga sanay mitooray micomod i nitelekan saheto o salikaka no kiwkay. (3) Pa'icel salikaka o citodong to ta'ong, mipili'ay ko kiwkay to foksi ciwlo, mipadamso to pakosiya ato maponengay tamdaw. (4) kasakiwkay i hoyin ato midemakay o misiikeday, nika masasidama o malikakaay. 5. Amilika. I 1620 miheca tayni fa'olohay pala a makoracay mitooray, nano o misiikeday , nika i Amilikaay a makoracay mitooray i Masacusa (Massachusetts) patireng to mirocokay kasanga'ay no syakay, niMosi a rikec, saan milaheci to so'elin no Kawas ko patosokan mikowan to sici, tangasa i 1833 miheca mapalasawad ko Masacusa. Saki ciwiko masafaco nangra, siiked i 1636 miheca ato 1701 miheca mapatireng ko Hofo ato Yale daykako. I 18 sici masereray, ikor o Konglikay ci Yonatan Edward (Jonathan Edwards, 1703-1758) ato Kalfin Wili (alvinistic Methodist) pakayraan ci Cioci Waytefid (George Whitefield, 1714-1770) to ko mikeriday, misatapang to i 1740-42 mihecaan mapalowad. Ikor ci Yonatan Edward (Jonathan Edwards) patireng to Niw cisi kakoyin oya Polinston daykako (Princeton University). Kalalaedan midotoc patireng to Wilian, Amhert, Opelin (Williams, Amherst, Oberlin) pitilidan. 19 sician, salongan ira ko 100 ko kiwkay miliyasay to Konglikay, mipatireng to Malacecayay ko tireng no Kawas a kiwkay. I 1781 miheca patireng to "Amilika kitakit wiyinhuy . tolo miheca kina cecay malisaot. 1833 miheca patireng to Kongli nipatatekoan . 6. Malikowat Kristo kiwkay Malikowat Kristo kiwkay I 1957 miheca masarocok, nai Kiristo Konglikay sokay ato Ratoh ato mifalicay pakayraan kiwkay a matateko. 1997 miheca ira 1,400,000 ko salikaka.
S.PHON: == ko~uŋɾikaj == *. mako~uraʦaj mito~uo~uraj. maɾa ħo~uŋti ʦi marj, mifaɾiʦaj mito~uo~uraj maħərək to~u pataɾa to~u masataɬ~ɮasaj a səra, ʦaaj ka pawan niŋra ko~u ina ato~u sawaʦo~u no~u nijaħ, misaʡiʦəɾ mikariʡaŋ to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u mifaɾiʦaj to~u pito~uo~uran, kariʡaŋən ko~u mifaɾiʦaj, paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u tiŋso~ukiw. saka ənəm miħəʦa to~u kaɾa ħo~uŋti mapataj ʦiŋra, o~uja pifaɾiʦ to~u pito~uo~uran no~u inkiris a tajaɾ mapaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u aʦa. ʦi əɾi*ab~b~vətħ saka ʦəʦaj ko~u miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj, maɾato~usaaj ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak niŋra to~u kaŋaʡajaw, paʡiʦəɾ ʦiŋra o~u ħo~uŋti no~u inkiris o~u tatapaŋan no~u inkiris kiwkaj, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit a kiwkaj masaʦəʦaj ko~u ʡəɬ~ɮaw no~u pitaʡo~uŋ, o~uja kapo~uɾo~uŋan a sapito~uɾo~un a tiɾiɬ~ɮ. sapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u kaɾaɾijaŋ no~u pakajraan ato~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, nika o~uja nai rəniwa patiko~uaj a mifaɾiʦaj paʡiʦəɾ to~u taɬ~ɮamaan no~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, i **** miħəʦa o~u miɾijaŋaj ko~u pinaŋan, miɾijaŋ to~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan to~uɾo~un a tiɾiɬ~ɮ ato~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u pitaʡo~uŋ (taɬ~ɮamanaj riko~uʡ). ro~uma tamɬ~ɮaw maŋaɾaj miɾijaw misaʡo~upo~u to~u kiwkaj, patirəŋ to~u ko~uŋɾikaj ato~u paʦəno~uʡkaj, ro~uma a tamɬ~ɮaw itira sa i sako~uwan ko~u pifaɾiʦ a mako~uraʦaj mito~uo~uraj sa o~u inɬ~ɮəpənɬ~ɮənt ħan to~u ʦaŋra. kataɬ~ɮamaanan: (*) ʦaaj ka sa kiwħa, itira sa i ɾaɾo~uma no~u sako~uwan a mifaɾiʦ. o~u safanaʡ naŋra taɾo~uɾo~uŋ ko~u kafijo~uɾ to~u ni kaɾfin , misaʡiʦəɾ to~u kaira tatapaŋan raraw, mato~uɾəɬ~ɮaj, paso~uʡəɾinaj o~u mo~uʡəʦəɾaj, ato~u paʡajawaj so~uwaɾ. (*) o~u miɾijaŋaj to~u taɬ~ɮamaan no~u taħəka ato~u miɾijaŋaj to~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, maʡimər a miɾijaŋ to~u saʡəɬ~ɮaw no~u pitaɬ~ɮəm. (*) ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u piŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u faŋʦaɾaj ʦo~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ, awaajto~u ko~u ro~uma. (*) maʡimər to~u pisaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮan ato~u wajwaj a ɬ~ɮəmak. *. ko~uŋɾikaj: mako~uraʦaj mito~uo~uraj a maro~uħaro~uħaj faʦo~u i **** miħəʦa miɾijas ʦaŋra to~u kitakit a kiwkaj o~u miɾijasaj sa ko~u paŋaŋan, nai ʦi ro~upət pro~un (ro~ub~b~vərt b~b~vro~uwnə, ****-****) ato~u ʦi ħənrj paro~uw (ħənrj b~b~varro~uw, ****-**) ko~u pikəriɬ~ɮ. mitiɾiɬ~ɮ ʦaŋra to~u pakajniaj to~u sapasifanaʡ a faʦo~u. **** miħəʦa i no~urwiʦ (no~urwiʦħ) patirəŋ to~u kiwkaj, mitəɾəkan ko~u pikapo~ut, kako~unijaħ mipiɾiʡ to~u patənakaj tamɬ~ɮaw, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u nitəɾəkan ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦi saɾo~uŋo~uʦ ko~u saɾikaka miʦo~uʡaʡaŋ ano~u əʦa maɾaɾijaŋ to~u ɬ~ɮəmak. iko~ur itira i kitakit kiwkaj ko~u tajaɾ ni ro~upət pro~un (ro~ub~b~vərt b~b~vro~uwnə), taŋasa kapatajan. ʦi paro~uw to~u ko~u miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦaj to~u tajaɾ taŋasa **** miħəʦaan a mapataj. ʦi *. ro~upinsən ( *. ro~ub~b~vinso~un , ****-****) aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u nitiɾiɬ~ɮan, maŋaɾəf ko~u ni jo~uħani o~uwən (*o~uħn o~uwən, ****-**) nitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u "tħə nato~u~urə o~uf a *o~uspəɾ ʦħo~u~urʦħ" iko~ur maɾapatəro~uŋan sifanaʡ no~u ko~uŋɾikaj. *. sarikəʦ. kakəriɬ~ɮan: tiŋso~ukiw, ɾo~utəkaj, sənko~uŋkaj, wisɾikaj, to~uŋʦənkiwkaj. ɬ~ɮajħiw: mifaɾiʦaj pakajraan=ʦiwɾo~u pakajraan. sɾikaka: ko~uŋɾikaj, paʦəno~uʡkaj. *. sfanaʡ: pro~un ato~u paro~uw (b~b~vro~uwnə & b~b~varro~uw) nano~u kaɾfin pakajraan. (*,**:b~b~vro~uwnə & b~b~varro~uw******.) (*) mipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u no~u kitakit ħaratəŋ, awaaj ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u sifo~u mitəɾək ano~u əʦa mikiħar to~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u kiwkaj. (*) o~u saɾikaka no~u kiwkaj pako~unijaħaj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ, o~uja parətatəŋa sanaj mito~uo~uraj miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i nitəɾəkan saħəto~u o~u saɾikaka no~u kiwkaj. (*) paʡiʦəɾ saɾikaka o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u taʡo~uŋ, mipiɾiʡaj ko~u kiwkaj to~u fo~uksi ʦiwɾo~u, mipaɬ~ɮamso~u to~u pako~usija ato~u mapo~unəŋaj tamɬ~ɮaw. (*) kasakiwkaj i ħo~ujin ato~u miɬ~ɮəmakaj o~u misiikəɬ~ɮaj, nika masasiɬ~ɮama o~u maɾikakaaj. *. amiɾika. i **** miħəʦa tajni faʡo~uɾo~uħaj paɾa a mako~uraʦaj mito~uo~uraj, nano~u o~u misiikəɬ~ɮaj , nika i amiɾikaaj a mako~uraʦaj mito~uo~uraj i masaʦo~u~usa (massaʦħo~u~usətts) patirəŋ to~u miro~uʦo~ukaj kasaŋaʡaj no~u sjakaj, nimo~usi a rikəʦ, saan miɾaħəʦi to~u so~uʡəɾin no~u kawas ko~u pato~uso~ukan miko~uwan to~u siʦi, taŋasa i **** miħəʦa mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u masaʦo~u~usa. saki ʦiwiko~u masafaʦo~u naŋra, siikəɬ~ɮ i **** miħəʦa ato~u **** miħəʦa mapatirəŋ ko~u ħo~ufo~u ato~u jaɾə ɬ~ɮajkako~u. i ** siʦi masərəraj, iko~ur o~u ko~uŋɾikaj ʦi jo~unatan əɬ~ɮwarɬ~ɮ (*o~unatħan əɬ~ɮwarɬ~ɮs, ****-****) ato~u kaɾfin wiɾi (aɾb~vinistiʦ mətħo~uɬ~ɮist) pakajraan ʦi ʦio~uʦi wajtəfiɬ~ɮ (*əo~ur*ə wħitəfiəɾɬ~ɮ, ****-****) to~u ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj, misatapaŋ to~u i ****-** miħəʦaan mapaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ. iko~ur ʦi jo~unatan əɬ~ɮwarɬ~ɮ (*o~unatħan əɬ~ɮwarɬ~ɮs) patirəŋ to~u niw ʦisi kako~ujin o~uja po~uɾinsto~un ɬ~ɮajkako~u (prinʦəto~un o~u~unib~vərsitj). kaɾaɾaəɬ~ɮan miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ patirəŋ to~u wiɾian, amħərt, o~upəɾin (wiɾɾiams, amħərst, o~ub~b~vərɾin) pitiɾiɬ~ɮan. ** siʦian, saɾo~uŋan ira ko~u *** ko~u kiwkaj miɾijasaj to~u ko~uŋɾikaj, mipatirəŋ to~u maɾaʦəʦajaj ko~u tirəŋ no~u kawas a kiwkaj. i **** miħəʦa patirəŋ to~u "amiɾika kitakit wijinħo~u~uj . to~uɾo~u miħəʦa kina ʦəʦaj maɾisao~ut. **** miħəʦa patirəŋ to~u ko~uŋɾi nipatatəko~uan . *. maɾiko~uwat kristo~u kiwkaj maɾiko~uwat kristo~u kiwkaj i **** miħəʦa masaro~uʦo~uk, nai kiristo~u ko~uŋɾikaj so~ukaj ato~u rato~uħ ato~u mifaɾiʦaj pakajraan kiwkaj a matatəko~u. **** miħəʦa ira *,***,*** ko~u saɾikaka.
